name: project-control-system
description: A general project control system for organizing complex work into control docs, phase tasks, ownership, decisions, reviews, archives, and Git-backed change records.

interface.shortDescription: Organize complex projects into clear control docs.
interface.longDescription: A general project control plugin for structuring folders, control documents, phase tasks, role ownership, decisions, execution notes, reviews, archives, and Git-backed change records without assuming a specific project domain.
defaultPrompt: Organize this project and prepare Git change records.
Create control docs, phase tasks, and ownership.
Separate current work, research, reviews, and archives.
